channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12678] LNet simplification work from linux client
item.description: Neil has been exploring how to simplify the LNet layer to make it suitable for linux kernel inclusion. This ticket will track this work for merger into the OpenSFS tree. Al Viro's iter work will also be ported over.
item.summary: LNet simplification work from linux client

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/35849/
Subject: LU-12678 lnet: switch lnet_sock_write() to sock_sendmsg()
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: d7229476f524cad1dd2446b0d6ea3849cae0816e
I have an old patch that is going to land but that doesn't mean this work is done. So please don't close.
still more work

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/52041/
Subject: LU-12678 lnet: discard lnet_kvaddr_to_page
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: a0d8023d07b114af0f325997fa2786ca53c92013

Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: a492a64d661e89639ea83efddef78b8287e29961
